headline: Teledyne Unifies ChartWorld and Raymarine Commercial Under a Single Global Commercial Navigation Brand
summary: THOUSAND OAKS, Calif., April 30, 2026--Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) ("Teledyne") today announced the unification of ChartWorld and Raymarine Commercial under a single commercial navigation brand, Raymarine Commercial. As part of the unification, ChartWorld’s commercial navigation solutions and services will transition fully into the Raymarine Commercial brand, further strengthening Teledyne’s position as a global leader in maritime navigation solutions and demonstrating the succ
